title: selfie referential
body:

[▶︎ atlas | bjorn vader](https://bjornvader.bandcamp.com/track/atlas)

selfie referential ))}}

ts eliot but i failed ery lit class i took
you can't tell me shit
and just expect it to change my relationship
to the way it looks
from right here, so i write what i hear
cuz i'm trying to share books
with all of y'all not just famous crooks
cashin in rehashing the same old hook
line and sinker to line the outside of your life with my skins sir it's so sinister
i was thinkin why not begin again right outside the lines you used to hem me in
cuz in here it's so insincere i'm dying trying to breathe this air
beyond the wasteland is a different place and i'm dying to get there
so i take the bait on every kick and snare
lucy is the devil when your world is nuts
she's just another get getting by by the time we grow up
you see my point re how i got there
from point to point over a lotta hot air
i'd be the wizard of oz if i ever got there
audience would applause in awe if only i could give it my all
but the world is not fair should i risk the fall
what if this balloon pop
on top could i survive so much distance from y'all
there's no place like home
you know when i heard that, when i was over the rainbow
before i found my way back
it don't look the same though
let me draw you a map
here's you, that's me
look how much more space between us than their used to be
i can see the look on your face now, i know you know what i mean
once you put it together there's no in-between
no seam to be seen
no point to point, no lines to read
no need to direct the only actor in the scene
